package rulecoverage

func PositiveGinHandlerContainsRetryOrBackoffOrchestration() string {
    ruleID := "gin_handler_contains_retry_or_backoff_orchestration"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Handlers that implement retry loops or backoff decisions inline instead of delegating to service or client layers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
